title: Titan Series™ Plastic Folding Chair - Non-Stacking - Dark Gray
features: If you're looking for a durable and extra comfortable seating option for your next event, look no further than our Titan Series™ Non-Stacking Plastic Folding Chair.

Yes, we know how convenient the stacking function is for storage but we had to sacrifice some of those qualities in order to offer a one of a kind, durable, lightweight and enjoyable sitting experience.

The contoured seat sports a 20'' x 23'' footprint and follows it up with a matching contoured back rest to maximize comfort levels while the steel folding chair frame insures that you're getting a product that will hold up from event season to event season.

Last but certainly not least, the most important and impressive function of this commercial-grade chair - clips on the side of each chair that connect to each other so you'll always have a straight line, and save much needed time throughout the process of setting up.

No matter the terrain, whether it be outside on a hill or inside at a banquet facilility, this plastic folding chair is truly one of a kind, and will be the perfect addition to your party rental company, event venue, school, church or any place where folks need a dependable and comfortable seat.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
